```{r child-common-setup}
#| include: false

# code chunks
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width = 8,
                      out.width = "100%",
                      collapse  = TRUE, 
                      comment   = "#>",
                      message   = FALSE, 
                      cache     = FALSE, 
                      error     = FALSE,
                      tidy      = FALSE, 
                      echo      = TRUE)

# inline numbers woth comma separators
knitr::knit_hooks$set(inline = function(x) {
    if (!is.numeric(x)) {
        x
    } else if (x >= 10000) {
        prettyNum(round(x, 2), big.mark = ",")
    } else {
        prettyNum(round(x, 2))
    }
})

# backup existing random number seed
oldseed <- NULL
if (exists(".Random.seed")) oldseed <- .Random.seed

# if Nrows equal to or less than this N, print all rows
options(datatable.print.nrows = 6) 

# if Nrows > N above, print this N rows
options(datatable.print.topn = 3)

# class of each column
options(datatable.print.class = TRUE)
```
